name: MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-6800+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - 2x HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.3 (B760MAWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, dual PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for mid-range builds.
